groceries.source: Consumer Reports, USDA ERS Food Price Outlook, NerdWallet

rankings.bestFor: Everyday staples, produce, store brand quality rivals name brands
rankings.watchOut: Limited selection, no name brands, inconsistent stock on specialty items

rankings.bestFor: Bulk buying for families, meat and dairy, organic options
rankings.watchOut: Requires $65+/year membership, must buy large quantities, easy to overspend

rankings.bestFor: One-stop shopping, Great Value brand, price matching
rankings.watchOut: Produce quality varies, crowded stores, less organic selection

rankings.bestFor: Sale cycles are excellent, fuel points, digital coupons stack well
rankings.watchOut: Regular prices are average, need to shop sales strategically

rankings.bestFor: Good Gather brand is solid, RedCard saves 5% on everything
rankings.watchOut: Higher on staples without RedCard, smaller grocery selection

rankings.bestFor: Unique store brands, frozen meals, snacks, wine
rankings.watchOut: No sales or coupons ever, limited conventional brands, small stores

rankings.bestFor: BOGO sales are genuinely good, bakery and deli, clean stores
rankings.watchOut: Regular prices are 15-20% above average, Southeast US only

rankings.bestFor: Organic selection, Prime member deals on Wednesdays, quality standards
rankings.watchOut: Premium pricing on everything, Prime deals are limited

electronics.source: PCMag, Wirecutter price tracking, Consumer Reports

rankings.bestFor: Widest selection, fast shipping, price drops during events
rankings.watchOut: Prices fluctuate wildly, counterfeit risk on marketplace items, easy to impulse buy

rankings.bestFor: Price matches Amazon, open-box deals save 15-30%, expert advice in store
rankings.watchOut: Regular prices slightly higher, extended warranty upsells

rankings.bestFor: Competitive on major brands, pickup available, Walmart+ free delivery
rankings.watchOut: Smaller tech selection, less knowledgeable staff

rankings.bestFor: Best return policy in retail (90 days electronics), bundle deals
rankings.watchOut: Limited selection, membership required, may not carry latest models immediately

rankings.bestFor: RedCard 5% discount, occasional exclusives, clean shopping experience
rankings.watchOut: Smaller selection, rarely the cheapest without RedCard

rankings.bestFor: Cleaning supplies, party supplies, basic household items at $1.25
rankings.watchOut: Smaller sizes, limited brands, quality varies on some items

rankings.bestFor: Store brand cleaning products rival name brands at 40% less
rankings.watchOut: Very limited selection, may not carry your preferred brand

rankings.bestFor: Kirkland brand is excellent quality, bulk = lower per-unit cost
rankings.watchOut: Must buy large quantities, storage space needed

rankings.bestFor: Widest selection, Great Value brand, one-stop convenience
rankings.watchOut: Name brands not discounted much vs other stores

rankings.bestFor: Up&Up brand quality, nicer store experience, RedCard discount
rankings.watchOut: Regularly priced 5-10% above Walmart without RedCard
